content.mainTitle: Download YouTube Shorts in Full HD
content.intro1: Y2mate is a free online tool that allows you to download YouTube Shorts in high quality directly to your phone or computer. As Shorts become the go-to for quick entertainment, our downloader ensures you can save those viral moments, creative edits, or helpful tips for offline viewing. It's a 100% web-based service, meaning you can grab any Short in its original vertical format without installing apps or signing up for an account.
content.intro2: Whether you want to keep a funny clip in your gallery to share with friends or save a recipe for later, Y2mate handles the conversion instantly. We focus on maintaining the original HD resolution so your downloads look just as crisp as they do on the app, all while keeping the process fast, safe, and completely ad-free.

instructions.title: How to Download YouTube Shorts in Seconds
steps: Copy the Short link: Tap the "Share" button on any YouTube Short and copy the URL.
Paste & Analyze: Paste the link into the Y2mate search box above and hit "Start."
Choose & Save: Select your preferred quality and click "Download." The video will be saved directly to your device's gallery or downloads folder.

whyChoose.title: Why Y2mate is Perfect for YouTube Shorts
reasons: Original Vertical Format: We ensure the video stays in its native 9:16 aspect ratio, making it perfect for re-watching on your phone or sharing on other social platforms.
High-Definition Quality: If the Short was uploaded in 1080p or 720p, you can download it in that exact resolution for the best visual experience.
Lightning Fast Downloads: Shorts are quick, and our downloader is too. Most clips are processed and ready to save in just a few heartbeats.
No Watermarks: Enjoy your favorite Shorts in their pure form. Y2mate saves the video exactly as it appears on YouTube without adding any extra overlays.

items.question: Is there a limit on how many Shorts I can download?
items.answer: Not at all! You can use Y2mate to download as many YouTube Shorts as you like. We don't have any daily caps or hidden fees.

items.question: How do I save a Short directly to my phone's Gallery?
items.answer:
On Android: Once the download is finished, the video will automatically appear in your "Downloads" folder and your Gallery app.
On iPhone: Use Safari to download the file. Tap the blue download icon, select the video, and then tap "Save Video" to move it directly into your Photos app.

items.question: Can I download YouTube Shorts as MP3 audio?
items.answer: Yes! If you only want the sound or music from a Short, simply choose the MP3 format after clicking "Start." You can get the audio in high quality up to 320kbps.

items.question: Does Y2mate work with Private Shorts?
items.answer: No, for privacy reasons, our tool only works with Public or Unlisted Shorts. If the creator set the video to "Private", the tool cannot access it to download.

items.question: Is it safe for my device?
items.answer: 100% safe. Since Y2mate is a browser-based tool, you don't need to install software or grant special permissions. Your device stays secure and clutter-free.
